headline: Viper Energy Launches Secondary Common Stock Offering By Diamondback Energy, Inc. and Certain Affiliates of EnCap Investments, L.P. and Oaktree Capital Management, L.P.
summary: MIDLAND, Texas, March 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Viper Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: VNOM) (“Viper”) announced today the launch of an underwritten public offering of 17,391,304 shares of its Class A common stock by Diamondback Energy, Inc. and certain affiliates of EnCap Investments, L.P. and Oaktree Capital Management, L.P. (together, the “Selling Stockholders”), subject to market and other conditions (the “Secondary Offering”). Viper will not receive any proceeds from the sale of the shares by the S

headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Chevron, Norwegian, Delta, Lockheed Martin, RTX, Berkshire Hathaway, and More
summary: Oil majors rally as the Mideast conflict drives up crude prices, while travel stocks slump as investors grow concerned about higher fuel costs.

headline: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading higher after the U.S. and Israel launched strikes against Iran over the weekend. Iran's decision to close the Strait of Hormuz contributes to investor concern that conflict could spread across the region as tensions escalate and disrupt supplies.

headline: 20% Of Global Oil At Risk As Iran War Escalates — 7 US Energy Stocks To Watch
summary: Oil jumps 8% in its biggest move since 2022 after U.S.-Israel strikes on Iran kill Ayatollah Khamenei. With 20% of global supply at risk, U.S. energy stocks rally sharply.

headline: Energy Stocks Surge As 'Operation Epic Fury' Ignites Middle East Oil Risk Premium
summary: Oil giants and related ETFs rocketed in pre-market action Monday, fueled by Brent crude's sharp climb on U.S.-Iran hostilities.
